data.title: SunPower Inc. Delays 2025 Annual Filing
data.description:
SunPower Inc ( (SPWR) ) has released a notification of late filing.

End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

SunPower Inc. has filed a Form 12b-25 to announce a delay in submitting its Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the fiscal year ended December 28, 2025. The company is postponing its Annual Report on Form 10-K (Yearly Report), covering its 2025 financial performance and operations.

Management says the delay stems from the need for additional time to complete year-end reporting procedures. SunPower notes it has devoted significant internal resources and is working diligently, suggesting process and workload pressures rather than a specific external shock or disclosed control failure.

The company expects to file the Form 10-K (Yearly Report) within the standard 15-day extension window allowed under SEC rules. It states that the report will be submitted as soon as practicable, indicating no expectation of a prolonged delay beyond that extension.

Preliminary, unaudited figures point to a sharp rise in revenue to $306.5 million in 2025 from $108.7 million in 2024, with higher costs and expenses but a narrower net loss of $36.2 million versus $56.5 million. These numbers, along with expectations for timely filing, are forward-looking and subject to change as final audit and review procedures conclude.

SunPower indicates it has kept current with all other required SEC filings over the past year, underscoring ongoing compliance efforts despite this delay. The notification is signed by Chief Financial Officer Wendell Laidley on March 30, 2026, signaling executive-level oversight of both the late filing and the company’s remedial actions.

The most recent analyst rating on (SPWR) stock is a Buy with a $5.40 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on SunPower Inc stock, see the SPWR Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Grown Rogue Delays 10-K Amid Accounting Shift
data.description:
Grown Rogue International ( (TSE:GRIN) ) has released a notification of late filing.

End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Grown Rogue International Inc. has filed a Form 12b-25 to notify investors of a delayed Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the financial year ended December 31, 2025. The company, now reporting as a U.S. domestic issuer, is transitioning its filings to U.S. GAAP from IFRS.

Management explains that the delay stems from the complexity of converting historical financials from IFRS to U.S. GAAP, which requires extensive accounting adjustments. These transition efforts mean the Form 10-K (Yearly Report) could not be completed within the normal SEC deadline without unreasonable effort or expense.

Despite the setback, Grown Rogue International Inc. expects to file the Annual Report on Form 10-K (Yearly Report) within the 15-calendar-day extension window allowed under the Form 12b-25 rules. Investors should therefore anticipate the 2025 Form 10-K (Yearly Report) to be submitted shortly after the original due date.

The company has signaled that it expects significant changes in reported results of operations compared with prior years, driven not by underlying business shifts but by the different accounting treatments under U.S. GAAP versus IFRS. Management cautions that previously reported figures will not be directly comparable and that final results may differ from current expectations, underscoring the forward-looking nature of these statements.

Grown Rogue International Inc. emphasizes its intention to remain in full compliance with U.S. reporting requirements as it completes the transition to domestic issuer status. The notification is signed by Chief Financial Officer Andrew Marchington on March 30, 2026, signaling executive-level oversight of the filing process and the company’s disclosure obligations.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:GRIN) stock is a Hold with a C$0.41 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Grown Rogue International stock, see the TSE:GRIN Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Creative Realities Delays Annual 10-K Filing
data.description:
Creative Realities ( (CREX) ) has released a notification of late filing.

End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Creative Realities, Inc. has filed a Form 12b-25, notifying investors that it will delay its Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. The company says the delayed filing relates specifically to its Annual Report on Form 10-K (Yearly Report), not to other periodic reports, which remain current.

Management attributes the delay mainly to heavy post-deal workload tied to several late-2025 transactions. These include the acquisition of the CDM Business, a preferred stock private placement, and a refinancing of its credit facilities, all of which have consumed substantial internal resources.

The integration of the CDM Business and the complexity of the financing moves have slowed the company’s ability to deliver information needed for the year-end audit. They have also delayed completion of disclosure controls and the evaluation of internal control over financial reporting as of December 31, 2025.

Creative Realities expects to file its Form 10-K (Yearly Report) within the standard 15-day extension window allowed under SEC Rule 12b-25. For investors, this signals a short, defined delay rather than an open-ended timing issue, though the company cautions that timing remains subject to execution risks.

The company warns that 2025 results will show significant changes versus 2024 because they will include two months of CDM Business operations and the impact of the financing transactions. However, it says it cannot yet provide reasonable quantitative estimates of these changes, framing all timing and impact comments as forward-looking statements subject to uncertainty.

Creative Realities notes that all other required filings over the past 12 months are up to date, indicating ongoing baseline compliance with SEC reporting rules. The notification is signed on March 30, 2026, by Chief Financial Officer Tamra Koshewa, underscoring management’s formal commitment to completing the delayed Form 10-K (Yearly Report) and addressing the remaining audit and control work.

ConnectM Technology Solutions ( (CNTM) ) has released a notification of late filing.

End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

ConnectM Technology Solutions, Inc. has filed a Form 12b-25 indicating a delay in submitting its Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. The company’s annual report was originally due March 31, 2026, but management now expects to use the allowed grace period for late filings.

The primary reason for the delay is extra time needed to complete documentation tied to the financial statement close process. Management states that filing by the original deadline would have required unreasonable effort or expense, suggesting workload and process timing issues rather than a specific external shock.

ConnectM says it expects to file the Form 10-K (Yearly Report) within the 15-day extension window provided under SEC Rule 12b-25. Investors should therefore anticipate the annual report to be submitted by mid-April 2026, assuming no further complications arise.

The company reports that all other required periodic filings over the past year have been made on time, and it does not anticipate any significant change in results of operations versus the prior fiscal year. As with all forward-looking statements, actual results and the final Form 10-K (Yearly Report) disclosures may differ once the audit and close process are fully completed.

ConnectM signals ongoing efforts to complete its financial close and remain in compliance with SEC reporting requirements. The notification is signed by Chief Executive Officer Bhaskar Panigrahi on March 30, 2026, underscoring executive-level oversight of the delay and the planned completion timeline.

The most recent analyst rating on (CNTM) stock is a Hold with a $0.40 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ConnectM Technology Solutions stock, see the CNTM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CNTM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CNTM is a Neutral.

The overall stock score for ConnectM Technology Solutions is primarily influenced by its challenging financial performance, which is a significant concern. However, the positive technical indicators and recent corporate events provide some optimism for future growth. The valuation remains unattractive due to the negative P/E ratio and lack of dividend yield.

data.title: FDCTech Delays 10-K Filing After Major Acquisition
data.description:
FDCTech ( (FDCT) ) has released a notification of late filing.

End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

FDCTech, Inc. has filed a Form 12b-25, notifying investors of a delay in submitting its Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the financial year ended December 31, 2025. The company, which trades in financial technology and brokerage-related activities, is pushing back its annual filing while it completes work related to a major acquisition.

The main reason for the delay is the October 29, 2025 acquisition of 100% of Alchemy International Limited, a Seychelles-based FX/CFD broker-dealer licensed by the local Financial Services Authority. FDCTech is performing a U.S. GAAP audit of Alchemy International Limited for the 2024 fiscal year, reviewing its 2025 interim results, and consolidating those figures into FDCTech’s own financial statements.

Management says this consolidation work could not be finished by the original deadline without unreasonable effort or expense. As a result, the company is relying on the standard SEC extension that allows additional time to finalize and file its Form 10-K (Yearly Report), indicating that it expects to complete the filing within 15 calendar days after the prescribed due date.

FDCTech also signaled that investors should expect a significant change in its financial profile once the acquisition is fully reflected. The company states that the Alchemy International Limited deal will materially increase net assets by over $17 million, generate more than $13 million in revenues, and add over $6 million in net income for the period from the acquisition date through December 31, 2025.

These figures are effectively preliminary, forward-looking indications based on management’s current review and consolidation work. Actual reported results in the Form 10-K (Yearly Report) could differ once audits are completed and all accounting entries are finalized, so investors should treat the disclosed numbers as estimates rather than final outcomes.

FDCTech notes that it has filed all other required periodic reports over the past 12 months, suggesting that the delay is specific to the complexity of this acquisition rather than a broader compliance breakdown. The notification is signed on behalf of the company by Chief Financial Officer and Principal Financial Officer Imran Firoz, dated March 30, 2026, underscoring management’s formal responsibility for the delayed filing and the ongoing effort to complete it promptly.

The most recent analyst rating on (FDCT) stock is a Hold with a $0.02 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on FDCTech stock, see the FDCT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on FDCT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FDCT is a Neutral.

The score is held back mainly by weak technicals (downtrend, negative MACD, very low RSI) and mixed fundamentals driven by negative operating/free cash flow and thin/negative net margins. These risks are partially offset by a stable, low-leverage balance sheet, strong revenue growth, a low P/E valuation, and positive expansion-related corporate events.

To see Spark’s full report on FDCT stock, click here.

More about FDCTech

data.description:

End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Summit Networks, Inc. has filed a Form 12b-25, notifying investors that it will delay its Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. The company says it cannot complete the annual report on time because it is still compiling and obtaining certain financial and other required information.

Management states that filing the Form 10-K (Yearly Report) by the normal deadline would require unreasonable effort and expense under the current circumstances. It emphasizes that this is a timing issue related to the preparation of disclosures rather than a stated breakdown in controls or a change in auditors.

Summit Networks expects to submit the delayed Form 10-K (Yearly Report) within the standard extension window, which for an annual report is up to fifteen calendar days after the original due date. Investors should therefore anticipate the filing in the near term, assuming no further complications arise.

The company indicates that it does not anticipate any significant change in results of operations compared with the prior fiscal year to be reflected in the upcoming earnings statements. As with all forward-looking statements, this expectation could change if new information emerges during the finalization of the financials or the audit process.

Summit Networks affirms that all other required periodic filings over the past 12 months have been made, underscoring its intent to remain in compliance with SEC reporting obligations. The notification was signed on March 30, 2026, by Chief Executive Officer Chao Long Huang, signaling executive-level oversight of the delayed filing and the company’s plan to complete the report promptly.

data.title: IGC Pharma Launches National Media Partnership to Boost Visibility
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

IGC Pharma ( (IGC) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 30, 2026, IGC Pharma announced a 12-part strategic national media partnership with financial media platform New to The Street to bolster its investor relations and corporate communications. The collaboration aims to expand visibility among institutional and retail investors through long-form televised interviews, national TV commercials, digital campaigns, and outdoor billboards in key financial hubs.

The campaign will feature IGC Pharma on sponsored programming on Fox Business and Bloomberg Television, with additional reach via digital distribution to more than 4.45 million YouTube subscribers, outdoor placements in Times Square and the New York City Financial District, and earned media across major U.S. broadcast affiliates. By tapping into New to The Street’s integrated television, digital, social, and event-based investor engagement network, IGC seeks to broaden market awareness and strengthen its capital markets profile while emphasizing continued focus on clinical execution and scientific development.

The most recent analyst rating on (IGC) stock is a Hold with a $0.25 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on IGC Pharma stock, see the IGC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on IGC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, IGC is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by very weak profitability and ongoing cash burn despite improving revenue and gross margin. Low leverage and new liquidity support help offset some risk, while technicals are only mildly constructive and valuation is limited by losses and the absence of a dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on IGC stock, click here.

More about IGC Pharma

IGC Pharma, Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing AI-enabled therapeutics for Alzheimer’s disease and metabolic disorders. Its lead asset, IGC-AD1, is in a Phase 2 CALMA trial targeting agitation in Alzheimer’s dementia, supported by a pipeline including TGR-63 for amyloid plaques and early-stage programs in neurodegeneration, tau, and metabolic dysfunctions.

The company leverages artificial intelligence to accelerate drug discovery, optimize clinical trials, and refine patient targeting, underpinned by a broad patent portfolio. Operating under the ticker NYSE American: IGC, it positions itself as an innovator advancing breakthrough therapies in neurology and related metabolic conditions.

Current Market Cap: $25.22M

data.title: Tenet Healthcare announces new senior vice president controller
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Tenet Healthcare ( (THC) ) has provided an announcement.

Tenet Healthcare has adjusted the retirement timeline for its Senior Vice President and Controller, R. Scott Ramsey, who will now retire effective April 30, 2026, instead of March 31, 2026, and remain employed on a part-time basis through March 31, 2028, to provide transition support. On March 25, 2026, the company appointed J. Michael Grooms as Senior Vice President and Controller effective April 6, 2026, and he will assume the role of Principal Accounting Officer on May 1, 2026, with a compensation package that includes a $475,000 base salary, performance-linked bonuses and a mix of service- and performance-based restricted stock units, signaling an orderly leadership transition in Tenet’s finance function.

The most recent analyst rating on (THC) stock is a Buy with a $216.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tenet Healthcare stock, see the THC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on THC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, THC is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by strong recent cash flow and an established uptrend in the stock, offset by leverage and less durable profitability, plus 2026 guidance risk from a potentially significant exchange-enrollment headwind and related uncertainty.

To see Spark’s full report on THC stock, click here.

More about Tenet Healthcare

Tenet Healthcare Corporation is a large U.S. healthcare services company that operates hospitals, outpatient centers and related healthcare facilities. The company focuses on delivering acute care and other medical services to patients through an extensive network of providers and supports clinicians and communities across the healthcare continuum.
